Hero.title: Fast internet. Real support. Local people.
Hero.subtitle: Fiber internet (GPON), digital television (GDN) and interactive TV (UNITV) for homes and businesses in Petrich and the region.

ServicesPreview.title: Everything a modern connection needs
ServicesPreview.subtitle: Three services under one roof — internet, television and interactive TV, with a single support interface.

gpon.title: Fiber internet (GPON)
gpon.desc: Symmetric fiber straight to your home. Low latency, stability and speeds up to 1000 Mbps.

gdn.title: Digital television (GDN)
gdn.desc: Hundreds of channels in HD quality. Sports, movies, kids and news — all in one.

unitv.title: Interactive TV (UNITV)
unitv.desc: Pause, rewind and record TV. Watch on your TV, phone or tablet.

Features.title: A constant connection with customers
Features.subtitle: We don't just sell internet — we're here when you need us.
Features.f1Desc: Report a problem from the portal and track its status — no phone call needed.
Features.f2Desc: Always informed about promotions, maintenance windows and network updates.
Features.f3Desc: Get confirmation and replies for every request or ticket.
Features.f4Desc: Round-the-clock access to your services, requests and billing from any device.
Features.f5Desc: Rate the service and help us get better.
Features.f6Desc: A request form, phone and email — always in one place.

CtaSection.title: Ready for faster internet?

Footer.tagline: Local provider of fiber internet and television in Petrich.

ServicesPage.title: Our services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Fiber internet, digital and interactive television — everything for your connection in one place.
ServicesPage.gponLong: Fiber internet over GPON technology brings the fiber straight to your home. That means symmetric speed, low latency and stability that copper cables can never offer.
ServicesPage.gdnLong: GDN (Galaxy Digital Network) digital television brings you hundreds of HD channels — sports, movies, documentaries, kids programs and news from around the world.
ServicesPage.unitvLong: UNITV interactive television changes the way you watch TV — pause, rewind, record and watch on your TV, phone or tablet, whenever and wherever you want.

PricingPage.title: Pricing & plans
PricingPage.subtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Choose the speed that fits your home or business.
PricingPage.note: Prices are indicative and will be filled with NETPLUS's real tariffs.
PricingPage.activationNote: Activation and equipment fees are negotiated individually.

AboutPage.title: About NETPLUS PETRICH
AboutPage.subtitle: A local provider on a mission to bring fast, reliable connectivity to every home in Petrich.
AboutPage.story: NETPLUS was created with a single goal — to offer the people of Petrich the internet and television they deserve: fast, stable and with real, human support. We're a local company and we know the region, because we live here.
AboutPage.mission: To build and maintain the best fiber network in Petrich and the region, focusing on service quality — not just price.
AboutPage.v1Desc: A local team that knows the region and is there when you need it.
AboutPage.v2Desc: Clear prices, real speeds and honest communication with no fine print.
AboutPage.v3Desc: We invest in modern infrastructure (GPON) and continuously improve it.

ContactsPage.title: Contacts
ContactsPage.subtitle: Get in touch — by phone, email or through the form below.
ContactsPage.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.

NewsPage.title: News
NewsPage.subtitle: Promotions, maintenance notices and everything current about the NETPLUS network.

RequestPage.title: Service request
RequestPage.subtitle: Fill in the form and our team will contact you within one business day.
RequestPage.successDesc: We'll contact you at the provided phone number within one business day.

Portal.subtitle: Access your services, requests and tickets — 24/7.
Portal.loginDesc: Sign in to your client portal.
Portal.registerDesc: No account? Create one in 2 minutes.
Portal.comingSoon: The client portal is under development.
Portal.comingSoonDesc: Soon you'll be able to submit tickets, track requests and communicate with our team directly from here.
